_comment: The fake camera's sample-frame catalog (mobile-implementation.md §10; capture-qc.md §1–2). Every entry renders the same bundled frontal frame — what varies is the simulated pipeline analysis: `metrics` overrides the passing-frame defaults (capture_qc.dart CaptureFrameMetrics), and MeasurementRepositoryFake runs the REAL capture-qc.md threshold table over them, so each fail code is reproduced by its documented rule (first failure in table order), never by a hardcoded verdict. Pick a scenario from the capture screen's dev-flavor QC selector.

samples.label: QC fail — poor lighting (mean luma 24 outside [40, 215])
QC fail — two bodies in frame
QC fail — side pose (shoulder/hip ratio 0.72 outside [0.9, 2.2])
QC fail — arms fused to torso (clearance 2% < 5%)
QC fail — too far (body 28% of frame < 40%)
Multi-fault — dark + blurry + far (reports poor_lighting only)
